device_control.changelog: Parity helpers (TCode UDP/TCP backends, dirty dedupe, sync ramp, smart limit, auto-reconnect), multi-instance backend support, addons_common shared package

streamer.changelog: Loop-safe aiohttp session: recreate per running loop so XBVR/Stash scene fetch no longer fails with 'Timeout context manager should be used inside a task' when the HereSphere bridge loop reuses the sync server's session

subtitle_translation.changelog: Pre-fetch the Qwen translation LLM before going offline (first Generate on a clean install failed: default LLM backend was uncached and HF offline mode blocked the download), models_ready gate so all models are cached before enable_offline_mode, dead-code cleanup

addons_common.changelog: Shared package: ServiceState, BackgroundJob, cleanup_old_files, RateLimiter, SpeedLimiter, AddonStatus registry
